description.value: APPEARANCE FUNCTION Aura moderate transmutation; CL 7th; Slot shoulders; Price 6,000 gp; Weight 1 lb. APPEARANCE This long green cloakâs back features an embroidered image of an ancient oak. FUNCTION Once per day on command, the wearer can assume the shape of a tree, as the tree shape spell, but can only take the form of a living tree. Furthermore, each hour the wearer spends in tree form while in direct sunlight, he heals 1d6 hit points. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, goodberry, tree shape; Cost 3,000 gp.
